message:
refactor(codegen): Consolidate VM fallback call pattern

Add emitVMFallback() as a method on NativeCodegen struct, allowing
direct calls via self.emitVMFallback() instead of requiring imports
of core.zig at every call site.

Changes:
- Add emitVMFallback() method that delegates to emitVMFallbackFromAST()
- Update all 14 call sites across 8 files to use new pattern
- Remove now-unused core.zig imports

Before:
  const core = @import("../../main/core.zig");
  try core.emitVMFallbackFromAST(self, .{ .call = call });

After:
  try self.emitVMFallback(.{ .call = call });
